title: selaginella roxburghii
intro: Selaginella roxburghii, also known as Spikemoss or Roxburgh's Spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella roxburghii include its ability to help lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain diseases such as diabetes and cancer. In herbal preparations, Selaginella roxburghii is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
